Test file - Not production code
Test file - Docker spawn is for testing purposes only
Test file - Audit logging not required in test utilities
Test file - No user input processed, all test data is internally generated
Test file - Audit logging happens in the server's deleteElement method, not in test
False positive - Template literals in error messages are not SQL queries
CLI utility - SecurityMonitor not available in standalone scripts. Security ensured via input validation and secure command execution patterns (DMCP-SEC-001, DMCP-SEC-002)
Intentional execSync for cross-platform OS dialogs. All user input is properly escaped using escapeShellArg (Unix) or Base64 encoding (PowerShell)
DisplayService receives sanitized input from TieredSafetyService. Unicode normalization happens at validation boundaries, not in display layer
TieredSafetyService validates operation safety levels, not user input. Input validation with Unicode normalization is handled by upstream validators
Generic data structure - does not process user input. All callers (Agent, SecurityTelemetry, SecurityMonitor, Logger) sanitize input before pushing to the queue

Client-side browser JavaScript. SecureYamlParser is a Node.js module unavailable in browser context. safeParseYaml() wrapper uses CORE_SCHEMA (safe, no custom types) with 512KB size limit. Data served from localhost or trusted GitHub collection API.
Client-side browser JavaScript. UnicodeValidator is a Node.js module unavailable in browser context. Input served from DollhouseMCP server which normalizes before serving.

Client-side browser JavaScript (#1780 console auth helper). UnicodeValidator is a Node.js module unavailable in browser context. Token is read from a server-injected meta tag, normalized via native String.prototype.normalize('NFC'), and rejected unless it matches the strict /^[0-9a-f]{64}$/ format. The authoritative normalization happens in the middleware sanitizePresentedToken() and consoleToken.verify() on the server side.
NFC normalization added to req.path in SPA fallback handler. Scanner may flag file-level despite fix at line 180.
NFC normalization via normalizeInput() added to all req.params. Scanner may flag file-level despite fix.
NFC normalization added to both convertAgentToDollhouse() and convertDollhouseToAgent() entry points. Scanner may flag file-level despite fix.

All inputs arrive via MCPAQLHandler.dispatchGatekeeper() which validates params through validateRequiredString() and the MCP-AQL transport layer. Unicode normalization is applied at the MCPAQLHandler entry point before dispatch. This module receives pre-validated params, not raw user input.

HTTP inputs arrive via Express JSON middleware from localhost-only binding (127.0.0.1). The POST /evaluate_permission route forwards to MCPAQLHandler.handleRead() which applies Unicode normalization at its entry point. The GET /permissions/status route has no user input parameters.
Static schema/route definitions only — no runtime user input processing. Contains operation metadata (types, descriptions, examples) used for MCP tool registration.
Registration entry point only — resolves DI container references and wires deferred startup. No user input processing. All user input flows through MCPAQLHandler which normalizes at its boundary.

_comment: Paths use glob patterns to match in both local and CI environments
